title: Remove %T from tests
body:
https://discourse.llvm.org/t/rfc-remove-support-for-t-from-llvm-lit/87726 is the RFC. Regardless of RFC it would be good not to rely on deprecated features.
```bash
$ grep "%T/" test -r
test/Conversion/SCFToCalyx/write_memory.mlir:// RUN: circt-opt %s --lower-scf-to-calyx="write-json=%T/data" -canonicalize>/dev/null && FileCheck %s < %T/data.json
test/Target/DebugInfo/emit-hgldd.mlir:// RUN: cat %T/Foo.dd | FileCheck %s --check-prefix=CHECK-FOO
test/Target/DebugInfo/emit-hgldd.mlir:// RUN: cat %T/Bar.dd | FileCheck %s --check-prefix=CHECK-BAR

$ grep "%T/" integration_test/ -r
integration_test/Dialect/FSM/simple/top.mlir:// RUN: circt-rtl-sim.py --compileargs="-I%T/.." top.sv %S/driver.cpp --no-default-driver | FileCheck %s
integration_test/Dialect/FSM/variable/top.mlir:// RUN: circt-rtl-sim.py --compileargs="-I%T/.." top.sv %S/driver.cpp --no-default-driver | FileCheck %s
```
code_blocks:
$ grep "%T/" test -r
test/Conversion/SCFToCalyx/write_memory.mlir:// RUN: circt-opt %s --lower-scf-to-calyx="write-json=%T/data" -canonicalize>/dev/null && FileCheck %s < %T/data.json
test/Target/DebugInfo/emit-hgldd.mlir:// RUN: cat %T/Foo.dd | FileCheck %s --check-prefix=CHECK-FOO
test/Target/DebugInfo/emit-hgldd.mlir:// RUN: cat %T/Bar.dd | FileCheck %s --check-prefix=CHECK-BAR

$ grep "%T/" integration_test/ -r
integration_test/Dialect/FSM/simple/top.mlir:// RUN: circt-rtl-sim.py --compileargs="-I%T/.." top.sv %S/driver.cpp --no-default-driver | FileCheck %s
integration_test/Dialect/FSM/variable/top.mlir:// RUN: circt-rtl-sim.py --compileargs="-I%T/.." top.sv %S/driver.cpp --no-default-driver | FileCheck %s
